properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 130/19
NORWEGIAN SEA/  GREENLAND SEA

ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER ON ANDOEYA,  IN THE PERIOD 25 NOVEMBER - 12 DECEMBER 2019. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 07:00 - 12:30 UTC. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD:
DANGER AREA C-REX-2.1: A. 69-17.8 N 016-02.0 EB. 69-24.0 N 015-58.0 EC. 69-24.0 N 015-54.0 ED. 69-22.5 N 015-47.5 EE. 69-19.0 N 015-54.0 EF. 69-18.0 N 015-59.0 E
DANGER AREA C-REX-2.2:A. 69-25.3 N 015-50.0 EB. 69-25.3 N 015-35.0 EC. 69-33.0 N 015-35.0 ED. 69-33.0 N 015-50.0 E
DANGER AREA C-REX-2.3:A. 72-16.0 N 010-20.0 EB. 72-16.0 N 012-26.0 EC. 71-26.0 N 012-26.0 ED. 71-26.0 N 010-20.0 E
